migration version (None = migrate to latest)\n    \"\"\"\n    current_version = get_migration_version(db_path) or 0\n    latest_version = 2  # This migration file\n\n    if target_version is None:\n        target_version = latest_version\n\n    if current_version == target_version:\n        logger.info(f\"Database is already at version {target_version}\")\n        return\n\n    if current_version < target_version:\n        # Migrate up\n        if target_version >= 2 and current_version < 2:\n            migrate_up(db_path)\n            set_migration_version(db_path, 2)\n    else:\n        # running the migration directly from command line\n    import sys\n\n    db_path_arg = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else \"/home/coding/aide-de-camp/data/session.db\"\n    db_path = Path(db_path_arg)\n\n    action = sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv) > 2 else \"up\"\n\n    if action == \"up\":\n        migrate_up(db_path)\n        version = get_migration_version(db_path) or 0\n {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"call_b7d7e5badedf4fc88f9598f9","type":"tool_result","content":"1\t# Component Usage Patterns Seed Data Design\n2\t\n3\t## Overview\n4\t\n5\tThis document defines the seed data structure and match score values for the `component_usage_patterns` table in the aide-de-camp component library system. The seed data provides initial mappings between result types and UI components to enable the hot-path renderer to select appropriate components without LLM calls.\n6\t\n7\t## Schema Definition\n8\t\n9\t### Table: `component_usage_patterns`\n10\t\n11\t```sql\n12\tCREATE TABLE component_usage_patterns (\n13\t    result_type TEXT NOT NULL,          -- e.g., \"status:ibkr-mcp\", \"lookup:logs:adc\"\n14\t    component_id TEXT NOT NULL,        -- References components.id\n15\t    layout_bucket TEXT NOT NULL,        -- 'compact' | 'normal' | 'expanded'\n16\t    match_score REAL NOT NULL,          -- Confidence score 0.0-1.0\n17\t    sample_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,\n18\t    updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL,        -- Unix timestamp\n19\t    PRIMARY KEY (result_type, component_id, layout_bucket)\n20\t);\n21\t```\n22\t\n23\t### Seed Data Format\n24\t\n25\t```python\n26\t(\n27\t    result_type: str,      # Colon-separated hierarchical key\n28\t    component_id: str,      # Must exist in components table\n29\t    layout_bucket: str,    # One of: 'compact', 'normal', 'expanded'\n30\t    match_score: float,    # 0.0 to 1.0 confidence\n31\t    sample_count: int      # Number of times this pattern has been observed\n32\t)\n33\t```\n34\t\n35\t## Result Type Taxonomy\n36\t\n37\tResult types follow a colon-separated hierarchical naming convention derived in `src/render/hot_path.py`:\n38\t\n39\t```\n40\t{intent_type}:{project_slug}                    # Intent-derived\n41\tlookup:{lookup_kind}:{project_slug}            # Lookup threads\n42\tmonitoring:{project_slug}                       # Monitoring results\n43\t{intent_type}:general                           # No project slug fallback\n44\t```\n45\t\n46\t### Common Intent Types\n47\t\n48\t- **status** - Status checks, health queries, state queries\n49\t- **action** - Actions, operations, executions\n50\t- **lookup** - Data lookups (logs, config, metrics)\n51\t- **monitoring** - Monitoring and alerting data\n52\t- **compound** - Multi-part aggregated results\n53\t\n54\t### Common Project Slugs\n55\t\n56\t- **ibkr-mcp** - Interactive Brokers MCP server\n57\t- **adc** - aide-de-camp (self)\n58\t- **general** - Fallback when no project identified\n59\t- **k8s** - Kubernetes operations\n60\t- **git** - Git operations\n61\t\n62\t## Layout Buckets\n63\t\n64\t### Layout: `compact` (Dense, ~120px height)\n65\t\n66\t- **Use case**: High-density displays, list views, status dashboards\n67\t- **Best for**: Simple status checks, binary states, counters, badges\n68\t- **Typical content**: Status indicator + 1-2 key fields, minimal text\n69\t- **Examples**: Pod running/stopped, build success/fail, deployment ready/pending\n70\t\n71\t### Layout: `normal` (Balanced, ~200px height)\n72\t\n73\t- **Use case**: Default card layout, balanced information density\n74\t- **Best for**: Most result types, moderate information density\n75\t- **Typical content**: Title + 3-6 key-value pairs, summary, 1-level nested data\n76\t- **Examples**: Pod status with resource limits, commit info with files changed, logs viewer preview\n77\t\n78\t### Layout: `expanded` (Full, ~400px+ height)\n79\t\n80\t- **Use case**: Maximum information display, detailed views\n81\t- **Best for**: Complex results, multi-item lists, full logs/config\n82\t- **Typical content**: Full arrays/objects, long text, multiple sections, tables\n83\t- **Examples**: Full pod spec, complete commit message, extended logs, full config file\n84\t\n85\t## Match Score Rationale\n86\t\n87\t### Score Range: 0.0 - 1.0\n88\t\n89\t| Score Range | Confidence | Interpretation |\n90\t|-------------|-----------|----------------|\n91\t| **0.95 - 1.00** | Perfect | Exact component designed for this result type |\n92\t| **0.85 - 0.94** | Excellent | Very strong semantic match, purpose-built component |\n93\t| **0.70 - 0.84** | Good | Strong match, general-purpose component fits well |\n94\t| **0.50 - 0.69** | Fair | Moderate match, usable but not ideal |\n95\t| **0.30 - 0.49** | Poor | Weak match, fallback territory |\n96\t| **0.00 - 0.29** | None | No meaningful match, should not be used |\n97\t\n98\t### Scoring Guidelines\n99\t\n100\t1. **Exact name match** = 1.0 (component.name == result_type key part)\n101\t2. **Keyword overlap** = +0.1 per matching keyword (max +0.3)\n102\t3. **Domain specificity** = +0.15 for domain-specific components\n103\t4. **Layout appropriateness** = +0.05 for layout-appropriate components\n104\t5. **Proven fit** = baseline score from successful usage\n105\t\n106\t### Thresholds\n107\t\n108\t- **Hot-path threshold**: 0.7 (DEFAULT_MATCH_THRESHOLD in `hot_path.py`)\n109\t- **Semantic fallback threshold**: 0.5 (in `ComponentLibrary.find_best_component`)\n110\t- Patterns below 0.7 will trigger fallback to generic card\n111\t\n112\t## Seed Data Patterns\n113\t\n114\t### Core Principle\n115\t\n116\tEach pattern represents a learned mapping: *\"When result_type X appears in context Y, component Z with layout L is a good fit with confidence S.\"*\n117\t\n118\t### Category: Status Results\n119\t\n120\t```python\n121\t# Project-specific status patterns\n122\t(\"status:ibkr-mcp\", \"comp-ibkr-status\", \"normal\", 0.95, 25),\n123\t(\"status:ibkr-mcp\", \"comp-ibkr-status\", \"compact\", 0.90, 10),\n124\t(\"status:adc\", \"comp-adc-status\", \"normal\", 0.95, 20),\n125\t(\"status:adc\", \"comp-adc-status\", \"compact\", 0.88, 8),\n126\t\n127\t# Kubernetes status patterns\n128\t(\"status:k8s\", \"comp-k8s-pod-status\", \"normal\", 0.94, 30),\n129\t(\"status:k8s\", \"comp-k8s-pod-status\", \"compact\", 0.89, 15),\n130\t(\"status:k8s\", \"comp-k8s-deployment-status\", \"normal\", 0.92, 18),\n131\t(\"status:k8s\", \"comp-k8s-service-status\", \"compact\", 0.91, 12),\n132\t\n133\t# Git operations status\n134\t(\"status:git\", \"comp-git-status\", \"normal\", 0.93, 22),\n135\t(\"status:git\", \"comp-git-status\", \"compact\", 0.87, 11),\n136\t(\"status:git\", \"comp-git-commit-info\", \"normal\", 0.91, 16),\n137\t\n138\t# CI/CD status\n139\t(\"status:ci\", \"comp-ci-pipeline-status\", \"normal\", 0.96, 28),\n140\t(\"status:ci\", \"comp-ci-pipeline-status\", \"compact\", 0.90, 14),\n141\t(\"status:ci\", \"comp-ci-build-status\", \"expanded\", 0.92, 10),\n142\t```\n143\t\n144\t**Rationale**:\n145\t- Project-specific patterns get highest scores (0.95) for exact fit\n146\t- K8s patterns score high (0.89-0.94) as k8s operations have well-defined schemas\n147\t- CI/CD gets 0.92-0.96 as CI results are highly structured\n148\t- Compact layouts score 0.04-0.06 lower than normal for same pattern (density trade-off)\n149\t\n150\t### Category: Lookup Results\n151\t\n152\t```python\n153\t# Logs lookup patterns\n154\t(\"lookup:logs:ibkr-mcp\", \"comp-logs-viewer\", \"expanded\", 0.96, 40),\n155\t(\"lookup:logs:ibkr-mcp\", \"comp-logs-viewer\", \"normal\", 0.93, 25),\n156\t(\"lookup:logs:adc\", \"comp-logs-viewer\", \"expanded\", 0.95, 35),\n157\t(\"lookup:logs:adc\", \"comp-logs-viewer\", \"normal\", 0.92, 20),\n158\t(\"lookup:logs:k8s\", \"comp-k8s-logs\", \"expanded\", 0.97, 50),\n159\t(\"lookup:logs:general\", \"comp-logs-viewer\", \"expanded\", 0.85, 15),\n160\t\n161\t# Config lookup patterns\n162\t(\"lookup:config:ibkr-mcp\", \"comp-config-viewer\", \"normal\", 0.92, 18),\n163\t(\"lookup:config:ibkr-mcp\", \"comp-config-viewer\", \"expanded\", 0.94, 12),\n164\t(\"lookup:config:adc\", \"comp-config-viewer\", \"normal\", 0.91, 15),\n165\t(\"lookup:config:k8s\", \"comp-k8s-config\", \"expanded\", 0.95, 30),\n166\t(\"lookup:config:general\", \"comp-config-viewer\", \"normal\", 0.82, 10),\n167\t\n168\t# Metrics lookup patterns\n169\t(\"lookup:metrics:k8s\", \"comp-k8s-metrics\", \"normal\", 0.93, 20),\n170\t(\"lookup:metrics:k8s\", \"comp-k8s-metrics\", \"expanded\", 0.95, 15),\n171\t```\n172\t\n173\t**Rationale**:\n174\t- Logs patterns score highest (0.93-0.97) as logs have very specific structure\n175\t- Expanded layouts favored for logs (full log display)\n176\t- Config scores 0.82-0.95 depending on specificity\n177\t- Metrics patterns get 0.93+ for structured numerical data\n178\t\n179\t### Category: Action Results\n180\t\n181\t```python\n182\t# General action patterns\n183\t(\"action:general\", \"comp-action-result\", \"normal\", 0.85, 20),\n184\t(\"action:general\", \"comp-action-result\", \"compact\", 0.80, 10),\n185\t\n186\t# Deployment actions\n187\t(\"action:deploy\", \"comp-deployment-result\", \"normal\", 0.92, 25),\n188\t(\"action:deploy\", \"comp-deployment-result\", \"expanded\", 0.90, 12),\n189\t\n190\t# Restart/restart actions\n191\t(\"action:restart\", \"comp-restart-result\", \"compact\", 0.91, 18),\n192\t(\"action:restart\", \"comp-restart-result\", \"normal\", 0.88, 14),\n193\t\n194\t# Scaling actions\n195\t(\"action:scale\", \"comp-scale-result\", \"normal\", 0.90, 16),\n196\t(\"action:scale\", \"comp-scale-result\", \"expanded\", 0.87, 8),\n197\t```\n198\t\n199\t**Rationale**:\n200\t- General actions get moderate scores (0.80-0.85) as action results vary widely\n201\t- Specific action types (deploy, restart, scale) score higher (0.87-0.92)\n202\t- Compact layouts work well for simple binary action results\n203\t\n204\t### Category: Monitoring Results\n205\t\n206\t```python\n207\t# Kubernetes monitoring\n208\t(\"monitoring:k8s\", \"comp-k8s-monitoring\", \"normal\", 0.94, 35),\n209\t(\"monitoring:k8s\", \"comp-k8s-monitoring\", \"expanded\", 0.96, 25),\n210\t(\"monitoring:k8s\", \"comp-k8s-monitoring\", \"compact\", 0.88, 15),\n211\t\n212\t# Application monitoring\n213\t(\"monitoring:adc\", \"comp-adc-metrics\", \"normal\", 0.91, 20),\n214\t(\"monitoring:ibkr-mcp\", \"comp-ibkr-metrics\", \"normal\", 0.90, 18),\n215\t\n216\t# General monitoring\n217\t(\"monitoring:general\", \"comp-monitoring-card\", \"normal\", 0.82, 12),\n218\t```\n219\t\n220\t**Rationale**:\n221\t- K8s monitoring scores highest (0.88-0.96) as k8s metrics are well-structured\n222\t- Expanded layouts score highest for monitoring (time series, multiple metrics)\n223\t- Project-specific monitoring scores 0.90-0.91\n224\t\n225\t### Category: Fallback Patterns (Generic Components)\n226\t\n227\t```python\n228\t# Generic fallbacks for unmatched types\n229\t(\"status:general\", \"comp-generic-status\", \"normal\", 0.70, 30),\n230\t(\"status:general\", \"comp-generic-status\", \"compact\", 0.68, 15),\n231\t(\"action:general\", \"comp-generic-action\", \"normal\", 0.70, 25),\n232\t(\"lookup:general\", \"comp-generic-lookup\", \"normal\", 0.70, 20),\n233\t(\"monitoring:general\", \"comp-generic-monitoring\", \"normal\", 0.70, 18),\n234\t(\"compound:general\", \"comp-generic-compound\", \"expanded\", 0.70, 22),\n235\t```\n236\t\n237\t**Rationale**:\n238\t- All generic patterns score exactly 0.70 (at threshold)\n239\t- Provides minimum viable match without false confidence\n240\t- Sample counts reflect high usage but low specificity\n241\t\n242\t## Component Template Examples\n243\t\n244\t### Status Component Template\n245\t\n246\t```html\n247\t<!-- comp-k8s-pod-status -->\n248\t<div class=\"k8s-pod-card\" data-pod-name=\"{{pod.name}}\" data-namespace=\"{{pod.namespace}}\">\n249\t  <div class=\"pod-header\">\n250\t    <span class=\"pod-name\">{{pod.name}}</span>\n251\t    <span class=\"pod-namespace\">{{pod.namespace}}</span>\n252\t  </div>\n253\t  <div class=\"pod-status {{pod.phase.lower}}\">{{pod.phase}}</span>\n254\t  <div class=\"pod-details\">\n255\t    <div class=\"detail-row\">\n256\t      <span class=\"label\">Ready:</span>\n257\t      <span class=\"value\">{{pod.ready}}/{{pod.containers}}</span>\n258\t    </div>\n259\t    <div class=\"detail-row\">\n260\t      <span class=\"label\">Restarts:</span>\n261\t      <span class=\"value\">{{pod.restarts}}</span>\n262\t    </div>\n263\t    <div class=\"detail-row\">\n264\t      <span class=\"label\">Age:</span>\n265\t      <span class=\"value\">{{pod.age}}</span>\n266\t    </div>\n267\t  </div>\n268\t</div>\n269\t```\n270\t\n271\t### Logs Component Template\n272\t\n273\t```html\n274\t<!-- comp-logs-viewer -->\n275\t<div class=\"logs-viewer\" data-source=\"{{source}}\">\n276\t  <div class=\"logs-header\">\n277\t    <span class=\"source\">{{source}}</span>\n278\t    <span class=\"line-count\">{{lines.length}} lines</span>\n279\t  </div>\n280\t  <div class=\"logs-content\">\n281\t    {{#each lines}}\n282\t    <div class=\"log-line {{#if error}}error{{/if}}\">\n283\t      <span class=\"timestamp\">{{this.timestamp}}</span>\n284\t      <span class=\"level\">{{this.level}}</span>\n285\t      <span class=\"message\">{{this.message}}</span>\n286\t    </div>\n287\t    {{/each}}\n288\t  </div>\n289\t</div>\n290\t```\n291\t\n292\t## Sample Count Guidance\n293\t\n294\tSample counts should reflect:\n295\t\n296\t1. **Production usage**: 20-50 for well-established patterns\n297\t2. **Common patterns**: 10-25 for frequently used patterns\n298\t3. **New patterns**: 5-15 for recently established patterns\n299\t4. **Generic fallbacks**: 15-30 (high usage, low specificity)\n300\t\n301\tHigher sample counts indicate more reliable patterns when sorting by `match_score DESC, sample_count DESC`.\n302\t\n303\t## Layout Bucket Assignment Strategy\n304\t\n305\t### When to use `compact`:\n306\t\n307\t- Binary status (running/stopped, success/fail)\n308\t- Single-value metrics (CPU: 75%, Memory: 2GB)\n309\t- Counters and badges (3 pods, 5 errors)\n310\t- High-density status dashboards\n311\t\n312\t### When to use `normal`:\n313\t\n314\t- Default layout for most result types\n315\t- 3-8 key-value pairs\n316\t- Single-level nested objects\n317\t- Summary + details views\n318\t\n319\t### When to use `expanded`:\n320\t\n321\t- Logs and text output (>10 lines)\n322\t- Full configurations (YAML/JSON)\n323\t- Multi-item lists (>10 items)\n324\t- Time-series data\n325\t- Complex nested structures\n326\t\n327\t## Implementation Notes\n328\t\n329\t1. **Component ID Requirements**: All `component_id` values must exist in the `components` table before seed patterns are loaded. The `load_seed_patterns()` function in `seed_patterns.py` validates this.\n330\t\n331\t2. **Timestamp Handling**: The `updated_at` field uses Unix timestamps (seconds since epoch). Seed data should use `int(time.time())` at load time.\n332\t\n333\t3. **Transaction Safety**: Pattern loading uses `INSERT OR IGNORE` to prevent conflicts with existing patterns while being idempotent.\n334\t\n335\t4. **Validation**: Match scores are validated to be in range 0.0-1.0. Layout buckets must be one of: 'compact', 'normal', 'expanded'.\n336\t\n337\t5. **Index Usage**: The `idx_component_usage_patterns_match_score` index enables efficient queries for `ORDER BY match_score DESC`.\n338\t\n339\t## Usage Example\n340\t\n341\t```python\n342\tfrom src.components.seed_patterns import load_seed_patterns, DEFAULT_SEED_PATTERNS\n343\tfrom src.components.library import get_library\n344\t\n345\t# Load seed patterns into the component library\n346\tlibrary = get_library()\n347\tloaded_count = load_seed_patterns(library)\n348\t\n349\tprint(f\"Loaded {loaded_count} seed patterns\")\n350\t```\n351\t\n352\t## Migration Notes\n353\t\n354\tWhen migrating from the old schema (without `layout_bucket`), existing patterns are assigned `layout_bucket = 'normal'` by default. See `_migrate_component_usage_patterns()` in `library.py`.\n355\t\n356\t---\n357\t\n358\t**Document Version**: 1.0  \n359\t**Last Updated**: 2025-01-23  \n360\t**Schema Version**: component_usage_patterns v2 (with layout_bucket and updated_at)\n361\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"3fde97fc-1a18-4350-a63e-86250b37150a","uuid":"a133e14f-e789-4862-a5ad-3cd7eb8d5387","timestamp":"2026-07-23T17:03:38.401Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/coding/aide-de-camp/docs/design/component_usage_patterns_seed_data.md","content":"# Component Usage Patterns Seed Data Design\n\n## Overview\n\nThis document defines the seed data structure and match score values for the `component_usage_patterns` table in the aide-de-camp component library system. The seed data provides initial mappings between result types and UI components to enable the hot-path renderer to select appropriate components without LLM calls.\n\n## Schema Definition\n\n### Table: `component_usage_patterns`\n\n```sql\nCREATE TABLE component_usage_patterns (\n    result_type TEXT NOT NULL,          -- e.g., \"status:ibkr-mcp\", \"lookup:logs:adc\"\n    component_id TEXT NOT NULL,        -- References components.id\n    layout_bucket TEXT NOT NULL,        -- 'compact' | 'normal' | 'expanded'\n    match_score REAL NOT NULL,          -- Confidence score 0.0-1.0\n    sample_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,\n    updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL,        -- Unix timestamp\n    PRIMARY KEY (result_type, component_id, layout_bucket)\n);\n```\n\n### Seed Data Format\n\n```python\n(\n    result_type: str,      # Colon-separated hierarchical key\n    component_id: str,      # Must exist in components table\n    layout_bucket: str,    # One of: 'compact', 'normal', 'expanded'\n    match_score: float,    # 0.0 to 1.0 confidence\n    sample_count: int      # Number of times this pattern has been observed\n)\n```\n\n## Result Type Taxonomy\n\nResult types follow a colon-separated hierarchical naming convention derived in `src/render/hot_path.py`:\n\n```\n{intent_type}:{project_slug}                    # Intent-derived\nlookup:{lookup_kind}:{project_slug}            # Lookup threads\nmonitoring:{project_slug}                       # Monitoring results\n{intent_type}:general                           # No project slug fallback\n```\n\n### Common Intent Types\n\n- **status** - Status checks, health queries, state queries\n- **action** - Actions, operations, executions\n- **lookup** - Data lookups (logs, config, metrics)\n- **monitoring** - Monitoring and alerting data\n- **compound** - Multi-part aggregated results\n\n### Common Project Slugs\n\n- **ibkr-mcp** - Interactive Brokers MCP server\n- **adc** - aide-de-camp (self)\n- **general** - Fallback when no project identified\n- **k8s** - Kubernetes operations\n- **git** - Git operations\n\n## Layout Buckets\n\n### Layout: `compact` (Dense, ~120px height)\n\n- **Use case**: High-density displays, list views, status dashboards\n- **Best for**: Simple status checks, binary states, counters, badges\n- **Typical content**: Status indicator + 1-2 key fields, minimal text\n- **Examples**: Pod running/stopped, build success/fail, deployment ready/pending\n\n### Layout: `normal` (Balanced, ~200px height)\n\n- **Use case**: Default card layout, balanced information density\n- **Best for**: Most result types, moderate information density\n- **Typical content**: Title + 3-6 key-value pairs, summary, 1-level nested data\n- **Examples**: Pod status with resource limits, commit info with files changed, logs viewer preview\n\n### Layout: `expanded` (Full, ~400px+ height)\n\n- **Use case**: Maximum information display, detailed views\n- **Best for**: Complex results, multi-item lists, full logs/config\n- **Typical content**: Full arrays/objects, long text, multiple sections, tables\n- **Examples**: Full pod spec, complete commit message, extended logs, full config file\n\n## Match Score Rationale\n\n### Score Range: 0.0 - 1.0\n\n| Score Range | Confidence | Interpretation |\n|-------------|-----------|----------------|\n| **0.95 - 1.00** | Perfect | Exact component designed for this result type |\n| **0.85 - 0.94** | Excellent | Very strong semantic match, purpose-built component |\n| **0.70 - 0.84** | Good | Strong match, general-purpose component fits well |\n| **0.50 - 0.69** | Fair | Moderate match, usable but not ideal |\n| **0.30 - 0.49** | Poor | Weak match, fallback territory |\n| **0.00 - 0.29** | None | No meaningful match, should not be used |\n\n### Scoring Guidelines\n\n1. **Exact name match** = 1.0 (component.name == result_type key part)\n2. **Keyword overlap** = +0.1 per matching keyword (max +0.3)\n3. **Domain specificity** = +0.15 for domain-specific components\n4. **Layout appropriateness** = +0.05 for layout-appropriate components\n5. **Proven fit** = baseline score from successful usage\n\n### Thresholds\n\n- **Hot-path threshold**: 0.7 (DEFAULT_MATCH_THRESHOLD in `hot_path.py`)\n- **Semantic fallback threshold**: 0.5 (in `ComponentLibrary.find_best_component`)\n- Patterns below 0.7 will trigger fallback to generic card\n\n## Seed Data Patterns\n\n### Core Principle\n\nEach pattern represents a learned mapping: *\"When result_type X appears in context Y, component Z with layout L is a good fit with confidence S.\"*\n\n### Category: Status Results\n\n```python\n# Project-specific status patterns\n(\"status:ibkr-mcp\", \"comp-ibkr-status\", \"normal\", 0.95, 25),\n(\"status:ibkr-mcp\", \"comp-ibkr-status\", \"compact\", 0.90, 10),\n(\"status:adc\", \"comp-adc-status\", \"normal\", 0.95, 20),\n(\"status:adc\", \"comp-adc-status\", \"compact\", 0.88, 8),\n\n# Kubernetes status patterns\n(\"status:k8s\", \"comp-k8s-pod-status\", \"normal\", 0.94, 30),\n(\"status:k8s\", \"comp-k8s-pod-status\", \"compact\", 0.89, 15),\n(\"status:k8s\", \"comp-k8s-deployment-status\", \"normal\", 0.92, 18),\n(\"status:k8s\", \"comp-k8s-service-status\", \"compact\", 0.91, 12),\n\n# Git operations status\n(\"status:git\", \"comp-git-status\", \"normal\", 0.93, 22),\n(\"status:git\", \"comp-git-status\", \"compact\", 0.87, 11),\n(\"status:git\", \"comp-git-commit-info\", \"normal\", 0.91, 16),\n\n# CI/CD status\n(\"status:ci\", \"comp-ci-pipeline-status\", \"normal\", 0.96, 28),\n(\"status:ci\", \"comp-ci-pipeline-status\", \"compact\", 0.90, 14),\n(\"status:ci\", \"comp-ci-build-status\", \"expanded\", 0.92, 10),\n```\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Project-specific patterns get highest scores (0.95) for exact fit\n- K8s patterns score high (0.89-0.94) as k8s operations have well-defined schemas\n- CI/CD gets 0.92-0.96 as CI results are highly structured\n- Compact layouts score 0.04-0.06 lower than normal for same pattern (density trade-off)\n\n### Category: Lookup Results\n\n```python\n# Logs lookup patterns\n(\"lookup:logs:ibkr-mcp\", \"comp-logs-viewer\", \"expanded\", 0.96, 40),\n(\"lookup:logs:ibkr-mcp\", \"comp-logs-viewer\", \"normal\", 0.93, 25),\n(\"lookup:logs:adc\", \"comp-logs-viewer\", \"expanded\", 0.95, 35),\n(\"lookup:logs:adc\", \"comp-logs-viewer\", \"normal\", 0.92, 20),\n(\"lookup:logs:k8s\", \"comp-k8s-logs\", \"expanded\", 0.97, 50),\n(\"lookup:logs:general\", \"comp-logs-viewer\", \"expanded\", 0.85, 15),\n\n# Config lookup patterns\n(\"lookup:config:ibkr-mcp\", \"comp-config-viewer\", \"normal\", 0.92, 18),\n(\"lookup:config:ibkr-mcp\", \"comp-config-viewer\", \"expanded\", 0.94, 12),\n(\"lookup:config:adc\", \"comp-config-viewer\", \"normal\", 0.91, 15),\n(\"lookup:config:k8s\", \"comp-k8s-config\", \"expanded\", 0.95, 30),\n(\"lookup:config:general\", \"comp-config-viewer\", \"normal\", 0.82, 10),\n\n# Metrics lookup patterns\n(\"lookup:metrics:k8s\", \"comp-k8s-metrics\", \"normal\", 0.93, 20),\n(\"lookup:metrics:k8s\", \"comp-k8s-metrics\", \"expanded\", 0.95, 15),\n```\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Logs patterns score highest (0.93-0.97) as logs have very specific structure\n- Expanded layouts favored for logs (full log display)\n- Config scores 0.82-0.95 depending on specificity\n- Metrics patterns get 0.93+ for structured numerical data\n\n### Category: Action Results\n\n```python\n# General action patterns\n(\"action:general\", \"comp-action-result\", \"normal\", 0.85, 20),\n(\"action:general\", \"comp-action-result\", \"compact\", 0.80, 10),\n\n# Deployment actions\n(\"action:deploy\", \"comp-deployment-result\", \"normal\", 0.92, 25),\n(\"action:deploy\", \"comp-deployment-result\", \"expanded\", 0.90, 12),\n\n# Restart/restart actions\n(\"action:restart\", \"comp-restart-result\", \"compact\", 0.91, 18),\n(\"action:restart\", \"comp-restart-result\", \"normal\", 0.88, 14),\n\n# Scaling actions\n(\"action:scale\", \"comp-scale-result\", \"normal\", 0.90, 16),\n(\"action:scale\", \"comp-scale-result\", \"expanded\", 0.87, 8),\n```\n\n**Rationale**:\n- General actions get moderate scores (0.80-0.85) as action results vary widely\n- Specific action types (deploy, restart, scale) score higher (0.87-0.92)\n- Compact layouts work well for simple binary action results\n\n### Category: Monitoring Results\n\n```python\n# Kubernetes monitoring\n(\"monitoring:k8s\", \"comp-k8s-monitoring\", \"normal\", 0.94, 35),\n(\"monitoring:k8s\", \"comp-k8s-monitoring\", \"expanded\", 0.96, 25),\n(\"monitoring:k8s\", \"comp-k8s-monitoring\", \"compact\", 0.88, 15),\n\n# Application monitoring\n(\"monitoring:adc\", \"comp-adc-metrics\", \"normal\", 0.91, 20),\n(\"monitoring:ibkr-mcp\", \"comp-ibkr-metrics\", \"normal\", 0.90, 18),\n\n# General monitoring\n(\"monitoring:general\", \"comp-monitoring-card\", \"normal\", 0.82, 12),\n```\n\n**Rationale**:\n- K8s monitoring scores highest (0.88-0.96) as k8s metrics are well-structured\n- Expanded layouts score highest for monitoring (time series, multiple metrics)\n- Project-specific monitoring scores 0.90-0.91\n\n### Category: Fallback Patterns (Generic Components)\n\n```python\n# Generic fallbacks for unmatched types\n(\"status:general\", \"comp-generic-status\", \"normal\", 0.70, 30),\n(\"status:general\", \"comp-generic-status\", \"compact\", 0.68, 15),\n(\"action:general\", \"comp-generic-action\", \"normal\", 0.70, 25),\n(\"lookup:general\", \"comp-generic-lookup\", \"normal\", 0.70, 20),\n(\"monitoring:general\", \"comp-generic-monitoring\", \"normal\", 0.70, 18),\n(\"compound:general\", \"comp-generic-compound\", \"expanded\", 0.70, 22),\n```\n\n**Rationale**:\n- All generic patterns score exactly 0.70 (at threshold)\n- Provides minimum viable match without false confidence\n- Sample counts reflect high usage but low specificity\n\n## Component Template Examples\n\n### Status Component Template\n\n```html\n<!-- comp-k8s-pod-status -->\n<div class=\"k8s-pod-card\" data-pod-name=\"{{pod.name}}\" data-namespace=\"{{pod.namespace}}\">\n  <div class=\"pod-header\">\n    <span class=\"pod-name\">{{pod.name}}</span>\n    <span class=\"pod-namespace\">{{pod.namespace}}</span>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"pod-status {{pod.phase.lower}}\">{{pod.phase}}</span>\n  <div class=\"pod-details\">\n    <div class=\"detail-row\">\n      <span class=\"label\">Ready:</span>\n      <span class=\"value\">{{pod.ready}}/{{pod.containers}}</span>\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"detail-row\">\n      <span class=\"label\">Restarts:</span>\n      <span class=\"value\">{{pod.restarts}}</span>\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"detail-row\">\n      <span class=\"label\">Age:</span>\n      <span class=\"value\">{{pod.age}}</span>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n```\n\n### Logs Component Template\n\n```html\n<!-- comp-logs-viewer -->\n<div class=\"logs-viewer\" data-source=\"{{source}}\">\n  <div class=\"logs-header\">\n    <span class=\"source\">{{source}}</span>\n    <span class=\"line-count\">{{lines.length}} lines</span>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"logs-content\">\n    {{#each lines}}\n    <div class=\"log-line {{#if error}}error{{/if}}\">\n      <span class=\"timestamp\">{{this.timestamp}}</span>\n      <span class=\"level\">{{this.level}}</span>\n      <span class=\"message\">{{this.message}}</span>\n    </div>\n    {{/each}}\n  </div>\n</div>\n```\n\n## Sample Count Guidance\n\nSample counts should reflect:\n\n1. **Production usage**: 20-50 for well-established patterns\n2. **Common patterns**: 10-25 for frequently used patterns\n3. **New patterns**: 5-15 for recently established patterns\n4. **Generic fallbacks**: 15-30 (high usage, low specificity)\n\nHigher sample counts indicate more reliable patterns when sorting by `match_score DESC, sample_count DESC`.\n\n## Layout Bucket Assignment Strategy\n\n### When to use `compact`:\n\n- Binary status (running/stopped, success/fail)\n- Single-value metrics (CPU: 75%, Memory: 2GB)\n- Counters and badges (3 pods, 5 errors)\n- High-density status dashboards\n\n### When to use `normal`:\n\n- Default layout for most result types\n- 3-8 key-value pairs\n- Single-level nested objects\n- Summary + details views\n\n### When to use `expanded`:\n\n- Logs and text output (>10 lines)\n- Full configurations (YAML/JSON)\n- Multi-item lists (>10 items)\n- Time-series data\n- Complex nested structures\n\n## Implementation Notes\n\n1. **Component ID Requirements**: All `component_id` values must exist in the `components` table before seed patterns are loaded. The `load_seed_patterns()` function in `seed_patterns.py` validates this.\n\n2. **Timestamp Handling**: The `updated_at` field uses Unix timestamps (seconds since epoch). Seed data should use `int(time.time())` at load time.\n\n3. **Transaction Safety**: Pattern loading uses `INSERT OR IGNORE` to prevent conflicts with existing patterns while being idempotent.\n\n4. **Validation**: Match scores are validated to be in range 0.0-1.0. Layout buckets must be one of: 'compact', 'normal', 'expanded'.\n\n5. **Index Usage**: The `idx_component_usage_patterns_match_score` index enables efficient queries for `ORDER BY match_score DESC`.\n\n## Usage Example\n\n```python\nfrom src.components.seed_patterns import load_seed_patterns, DEFAULT_SEED_PATTERNS\nfrom src.components.library import get_library\n\n# Load seed patterns into the component library\nlibrary = get_library()\nloaded_count = load_seed_patterns(library)\n\nprint(f\"Loaded {loaded_count} seed patterns\")\n```\n\n## Migration Notes\n\nWhen migrating from the old schema (without `layout_bucket`), existing patterns are assigned `layout_bucket = 'normal'` by default. See `_migrate_component_usage_patterns()` in `library.py`.\n\n---\n\n**Document Version**: 1.0  \n**Last Updated**: 2025-01-23  \n**Schema Version**: component_usage_patterns v2 (with layout_bucket and updated_at)\n","numLines":361,"startLine":1,"totalLines":361}}}
